Ajman’s leasehold contract value rose 20% year-on-year in Q1 2026 to AED1.442 billion ($392.6 million), covering 36,432 contracts, according to the Municipality and Planning Department.

The increase of around AED240 million underscores Ajman’s growing attractiveness as an investment destination, supporting efforts to enhance a competitive business environment in line with Ajman Vision 2030.

#Ajman #RealEstate #Investment #UAE #Economy

text:
Emirates NBD Reopens GCC Debt Markets with $750M AT1 Issuance 📈🏦  

@EmiratesNBD_AE has successfully priced a USD 750 million Additional Tier 1 (AT1) capital issuance, marking the first debt capital market issuance from a GCC issuer since late February 2026.  

👉Why this matters:  

☑️Market Reopener: Ends a 2-month lull in GCC debt capital markets, signaling renewed investor confidence in the region  
☑️Capital Strength: AT1 instruments bolster Emirates NBD’s Tier 1 capital, supporting growth while maintaining robust capital adequacy ratios  
☑️Benchmark for Region: Sets pricing and sentiment tone for other GCC banks and corporates looking to tap markets in Q2 2026  

👉Strategic Context:  

The issuance comes as UAE banks continue to show strong fundamentals — high liquidity, solid profitability, and proactive capital management. Emirates NBD’s move reflects both its own balance sheet strength and the broader resilience of the UAE banking sector amid global volatility.  

This transaction reinforces Dubai’s position as a leading financial hub and highlights international investor appetite for quality GCC credit.  

Congratulations to the Emirates NBD Treasury and DCM teams on a landmark reopening. 👏  

📌 @DXBMediaOffice 
#EmiratesNBD #UAE #Banking #DebtCapitalMarkets #AT1 #GCC #Finance #Dubai #CapitalMarkets #InvestorConfidence #DCM #DrBuAbdullah #BuAbdullahGroup
